title: ervatamia angustisepala
intro: Ervatamia angustisepala, also known as the narrow-leaved Evractamia or Evractamia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is native to tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ervatamia angustisepala include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a treatment for skin irritations and wounds. Ervatamia angustisepala is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal supplements or tinctures.
